F1 VISA INFORMATION
To: François Cornélis, President of RACB
From: Nikolas Tombazis, Single Seater Director
Date: 08.07. 2026 
2026 F1 VISA – FORMULA 1 GRAND PRIX OF BELGIUM
Dear President, 
I am pleased to share with you the following FIA Visa number for the above-mentioned
Competition: 
10F1/080726
This FIA Visa is granted based on the attached documents and is subject to compliance 
with the International Sporting Code:
x Timetable – any updated version remains subject to FIA Stewards’ approval.
x Appendix B3 including Part B, duly amended and completed by the FIA.
Many thanks in advance for your kind cooperation,
Yours sincerely,
Nikolas Tombazis
Single Seater Director 

Formula 1 Moët&Chandon Belgian Grand Prix 2026 - APPENDIX B3
FIA.COM
APPENDIX B3: INFORMATION REQUIRED 90 D
